# igniteui-webcomponents API (stub)

### [IgcCheckboxComponent](https://www.infragistics.com/products/ignite-ui-web-components/docs/typescript/latest/classes/igccheckboxcomponent.html)

A two-state checkbox custom element with form-association support.

## Properties

- **checked** `boolean` — Whether the checkbox is in the checked state. Defaults to `false`.
- **disabled** `boolean` — Whether the checkbox is disabled and not interactive.
- **indeterminate** `boolean` — Sets the indeterminate (tri-state) visual state.
- **labelPosition** `'before' | 'after'` — Position of the label relative to the checkbox indicator.
- **name** `string` — The name attribute used in form submission.
- **required** `boolean` — Marks the checkbox as required for form validation.
- **value** `string` — The value submitted with the parent form when checked.

## Methods

- **click()** — Programmatically toggles the checkbox.
- **reportValidity(): boolean** — Triggers a validity check and reports messages.
- **setCustomValidity(message: string): void** — Sets a custom validation message.

## Events

- **igcChange** — Fired when the checked state changes through user interaction.
- **igcFocus** — Fired when the element receives focus.
- **igcBlur** — Fired when the element loses focus.

### [IgcSwitchComponent](https://www.infragistics.com/products/ignite-ui-web-components/docs/typescript/latest/classes/igcswitchcomponent.html)

A two-state toggle switch element.

## Properties

- **checked** `boolean` — Whether the switch is on.
- **disabled** `boolean` — Whether the switch is disabled.

## Events

- **igcChange** — Fired when the switch is toggled.
